title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXVII. Natural History.
content:
Little Robin Red-breast
            Sat upon a rail:
        Niddle naddle went his head,
            Wiggle waggle went his tail.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXVII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
